findings.text: - `matcher_rule_inventory.json` — rule/source ownership, fixture refs, line refs,
- At least one entry in `matcher_regression_cases.json` (positive + negative) for each
6. Add new regression cases in `matcher_regression_cases.json` (positive + negative per keyword).
Any new regression case must be added to `matcher_regression_cases.json` BEFORE committing.
| `app/languages/sv/matcher_contracts/matcher_regression_cases.json` | Add positive + negative fixture for every new keyword | A, B, C |
| `app/languages/sv/matcher_contracts/matcher_rule_inventory.json` | Add entry per new mechanism | A, B, C |
- `matcher_regression_cases.json` is the main matcher parity corpus.
- `matcher_rule_inventory.json` is the rule/source inventory checked by
